results.title: Taste Radio: As Investors Get More Selective, Grocery Gets More Curated
results.description: What actually gets investors to say yes in today’s CPG market? We revisit conversations with founders, operators and investors at Taste Radio’s NYC Meetup who share candid advice on why disciplined growth, financial transparency and strong regional traction matter far more than hype. The hosts also dive into the rise of luxury and small-format grocery and discuss Olipop’s recent refresh.

results.title: SoFi Bolsters Enterprise FinTech Ecosystem With Peach Finance Acquisition
results.description: SoFi has acquired Peach Finance, a lending infrastructure startup specializing in loan servicing software. The acquisition expands SoFi’s enterprise technology capabilities, according to a Thursday (May 21) report by Coverager. Founded in 2018, Peach Finance provides a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform that supports loan servicing, processing, and infrastructure for consumer lenders, per the report. Prior to [...] The post SoFi Bolsters Enterprise FinTech Ecosystem With Peach Finance Acquisition appeared first on PYMNTS.com .

results.title: Solana’s RWA Ecosystem Reaches High Valuation of $2.8B
results.description: The rise of real world assets on blockchain has moved from theory to measurable financial infrastructure, and nowhere is that shift becoming more visible than in the Solana ecosystem. The Solana RWA ecosystem recently reached an all time high valuation of $2.8 billion, signaling that tokenized finance is entering a new stage of adoption. results.title: Takeaways, truth about Diamondbacks' slow start with Chase Field crowds
results.description: Crowds at Chase Field are down this year, but Arizona Diamondbacks officials say they expect attendance to pick up through the summer.
